CustomField.description: Stores the ID of the Form Template record used as the default template when entering single gifts through Gift Entry. NPPatch ships a starter template; admins can create additional templates in the Gift Entry Template Builder. Changing this value changes which template loads by default in the single-gift entry form. This field is automatically set when a default template is selected in NPPatch Settings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The default Form Template used for entering single gifts through Gift Entry.
CustomField.label: Default Gift Entry Template
